message:
web: Add commit tracking table and API endpoint

Track commits made by Claude Code sessions via PostToolUse hook.
Stores session_id, repo_path, timestamp, and commit_sha.

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/y6n0lmn968
